reviews.comment:
por cuestiones laborales , tuve que desayunar y almorzar toda la semana en el  local
excelente atención d Leandro y las chicas , siempre bien atentos y  buen trato , las/los playeros   tambien , muy buena presencia y  calidad d trabajo . . .

dan ganas  de ir a cargar nafta y comer , aunque tenga tanque lleno y no tenga hambre . . . .

excelente !

(Translated by Google)
Due to work commitments, I had to have breakfast and lunch there every week.
Excellent service from Leandro and the girls, always very attentive and friendly. The attendants were also very professional and did a great job.

It makes you want to go there to fill up and eat, even if you have a full tank and aren't hungry.

Excellent!

reviews.comment:
Horrible atención en la tienda full de Leandro, no solo conmigo si no con clientes posteriores a mi.  Muy poco amable y cara de pocos amigos. Entiendo q recién empieza el turno, será q no lo deje desayunar tranquilo? Quería agregar q se han comunicado conmigo para pedirme disculpas y me invitaron a volver. Agradezco este gesto de Leandro.

(Translated by Google)
Horrible service at Leandro's full store, not only to me but also to customers after me. Very unfriendly and unfriendly. I understand his shift is just starting. Could it be that I didn't let him have breakfast in peace? I wanted to add that they have contacted me to apologize and invited me back. I appreciate this gesture from Leandro.

reviewReply.comment: Juan Pablo, Gracias por tu comentario y reseña, l@ esperamos pronto para mejorar la experiencia anterior, saludos
